product_overview: A premium, AI-enabled public services platform that helps citizens access government services, report issues, and discover relevant schemes with clarity and ease. The experience should feel polished and modern while reducing bureaucratic friction.
core_goals: Make government services accessible and efficient for citizens
Enable citizens to report issues and file complaints without confusion
Help users discover relevant public schemes through guided and AI-assisted discovery
Deliver a premium, futuristic, and polished user experience
Maintain accessibility with WCAG AA compliance, including high contrast and keyboard navigation

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Provides the public-facing entry point to the platform and introduces citizens to the service experience.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 and display landing page content with platform introduction
GET / -> Receive 200 with accessible, high-contrast layout and navigation
GET /unknown-page -> Receive 404 not found and guide user back to the landing page

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows citizens to authenticate using email and password to access protected government service features.
user_flows: GET /login -> Receive 200 and display login form
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with authentication success and session or token -> Navigate to /dashboard -> Receive 200 with authenticated dashboard content
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid email or password -> Receive 401 unauthorized with error message -> Remain on /login and show validation feedback

features.name: Citizen Dashboard
features.description: Provides authenticated users with a personalized dashboard for accessing services, reporting issues, and viewing relevant guidance.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with valid authentication -> Receive 200 and display personalized dashboard content
GET /dashboard without authentication -> Receive 401 or redirect to /login -> User is prevented from viewing protected content
GET /dashboard with expired or invalid session -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Prompt user to log in again

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
